body_txt: The song sung by a villain who is attempting to seduce another character. Hence, this trope is closely related to Seduction Lyric — but a Seduction Lyric isn't always put in the mouth of a villain, or even sung, and not all Villain Love Songs are clear attempts at immediate sexual seduction. A Villain Love Song is generally not a full-blown Villain Song — hey, the villain's trying to impress someone, and blatantly reveling in puppy-punting has a knack for driving away potential love interests (but then again, they may have trouble understanding that ). Villains in love with other villains go under Unholy Matrimony . Contrast Final Love Duet . Often overlaps with Obsession Song , but not always.
